ModMetaData.name: Elves Expanded - CE
ModMetaData.author: opencode
ModMetaData.description:
Compatibility and flavor expansion for Faction - Elves (ICC.FOV.ELVES) under Combat Extended.
Elves are reimagined as disciplined marksmen and skirmishers who have embraced modern firearms without abandoning their traditions. Each elven faction receives upgraded tech levels, industrial-era weapon loadouts, and CE ammunition preferences that emphasize precision and quality over volume of fire.
- High Elvish Kingdom upgraded to Industrial tech level with scout carbines, ranger rifles, and noble precision weapons - Dark Elvish Kingdom upgraded to Industrial tech level with aggressive CQB loadouts and marksman support - Wild Elvish Tribe gains hunting rifles while retaining tribal identity - Celestia Elvish Empire receives CE loadout properties for its spacer arsenal - All combat pawn kinds configured with CE LoadoutPropertiesExtension for proper magazine counts, sidearms, and ammo preferences
